event_types.label: Shipping disruption
event_types.description: Port strikes, container shortages, freight delays affecting food imports

event_types.label: Extreme weather
event_types.description: Floods, droughts, hurricanes, freezes damaging crops or infrastructure

event_types.label: Crop disease or pest
event_types.description: Fungal, bacterial, or pest outbreaks affecting agricultural yield

event_types.label: Animal disease outbreak
event_types.description: Avian flu, foot and mouth, swine fever affecting livestock or poultry

event_types.label: Fuel cost spike
event_types.description: Rising energy prices increasing transport, farming, and processing costs

event_types.label: Labor shortage
event_types.description: Farm, processing, or logistics workforce shortages slowing supply

event_types.label: Trade policy or tariff
event_types.description: Import bans, export restrictions, tariffs disrupting food trade flows

event_types.label: Production constraint
event_types.description: Upstream factors reducing agricultural output including input shortages, water scarcity, and processing or facility disruptions. Examples: fertilizer shortage, irrigation restrictions, cannery closure

event_types.label: Currency or inflation pressure
event_types.description: Exchange rate shifts or broad inflation raising food import costs

event_types.label: Conflict or regional instability
event_types.description: War, civil unrest, or sanctions disrupting food producing or transit regions

event_types.label: Contamination or recall
event_types.description: Food safety incidents, recalls, or contamination events reducing supply

event_types.label: Demand surge
event_types.description: Panic buying, export demand spikes, or hoarding straining supply
